description: External tools required for building binject

msys2.description: MSYS2 provides Unix-like build environment for Windows

win32.manual: Pre-installed on GitHub Actions windows-2022 runners at C:/msys64

notes: Required for Windows builds to provide MinGW toolchain and Unix utilities
On GitHub Actions: Pre-installed at C:/msys64
Install mingw-w64-x86_64-xz package for liblzma support: pacman -Sy mingw-w64-x86_64-xz

xz-utils.description: XZ Utils provides liblzma compression library for binary injection
notes: liblzma is used for LZMA compression across all platforms
On Linux: provides both liblzma.so (runtime) and lzma.h (build-time)
On macOS: LZFSE is preferred for macOS binaries, but LZMA is also used
On Windows: Installed via MSYS2 MinGW package (mingw-w64-x86_64-xz)
